mapper.insert:
insert into student
name, no, gender, phone, degree, clazz_id, id_Card, is_College, address, graduation_Date
#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{degree}, #{clazzId}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{graduationDate},
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS clazzName FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
